message:
bd-16jzr: Crash Pack walkthrough (5-step example)

Five documented tests walking through the crash pack lifecycle:
1. Forced failure + crash pack emission from trace events
2. Write artifact to storage + JSON round-trip verification
3. Canonical fingerprint is schedule-independent (commuted events)
4. Replay command generation (cargo test + CLI modes)
5. Divergent prefix minimization (bisect to shortest repro)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
